name: Sugarless Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend all ingredients together until well combined.
2. Roll the mixture into balls using about 1 teaspoon of dough for each cookie.
3. Place the balls on ungreased baking sheets.
4. Flatten each cookie with the bottom of a glass that has been lightly dusted with flour.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) until the edges begin to brown, which should take about 6 minutes.
OPTIONS TO SWEETEN: Before baking, make a thumbprint in each cookie and fill it with chopped nuts or sugarless jam.
